title: RegressionPack
description: Targeted retest bundle built by the Regression Warden (roles/08-regression-warden.md) to verify accepted fixes without over-fitting. Includes the failure-revealing scenarios, close variants (to catch brittle fixes), and neighbors (to catch collateral damage).

built_for_plan_items.description: cluster_ids from the plan this pack guards.

role.description: failure-revealer: the original failing case. close-variant: a structural mutation to detect over-fit fixes. neighbor: an adjacent healthy case to detect collateral regressions.

target_overall.description: Post-fix score expected to meet or exceed.

verdict.description: 'inflated' = score rose via over-refusal/over-escalation rather than genuine improvement.

watchlist.description: Fragile domains to keep monitoring in future campaigns (persisted to memory/regression_watchlist.json).
